title: Pharao Khufu has build a pyramid.

data.title: Pharao Khufu has build a pyramid.
data.statement:
Can you determine its height just from the size of its base and the amount of building material?
The base of the pyramid is square with [[r]] cubits side length.
The construction was done with [[n]] blocks of size [[w]]x[[l]]x[[h]].

A pyramid has a square base with and four triangular sides, its volumen V= r^2*h /3

(The pyramid is completly smooth, with stone being cut to shape without any loss.)
data.stubGenerator:
read R:int
read N:int
read W:int L:int H:int
write height
data.inputDescription:
[[r]]Length of the bases side
[[n]] Number of Blocks
[[w]] width, [[l]]  length  and  [[h]] height of the blocks

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Can you determine its height just from the size of its base and the amount of building material?
The base of the pyramid is square with r cubits side length.
The construction was done with n blocks of size wxlxh.

A pyramid has a square base with and four triangular sides, its volumen V= r^2*h /3

(The pyramid is completly smooth, with stone being cut to shape without any loss.)
Input
rLength of the bases side
n Number of Blocks
w width, l length and h height of the blocks
Output
Height of pyramid
Constraints
All values Integers > 0
Example
Input
440
2274800
2 2 2
Output
282
